response.justification: The candidate presents a strong background in high-performance, distributed, and event-driven systems, with extensive experience in modern development methodologies and cloud technologies. While there is C++ experience and some exposure to industrial automation, the resume lacks recent primary C++ development focus and, critically, any mention of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443, SDL) which are central to this role. An interview would be necessary to assess current C++ proficiency and willingness to learn/apply industrial security practices.
strengths: Extensive experience (12+ years) in high-performance, distributed, and event-driven systems.
Demonstrated commitment to modern development practices like TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship.
Experience with industrial automation context (National Instruments) and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes).
concerns: Limited recent and primary hands-on C++ development experience for a C++ developer role.
No explicit mention of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards.
Lack of specific industrial protocol experience (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA, etc.) and explicit MQTT experience.
